message:
fix(freeze): Remove bundle size limit and handle large codebases

- Remove 2MB bundle size limit for freeze - works on any size now
- Increase bytecode file read limit from 50MB to 500MB
- Handle StackUnderflow error gracefully (return null, don't fail entire freeze)
- Fix inject_hooks.js to handle complex function parameters:
  - Handle nested parentheses in default params (e.g., func(a, b = function() {}))
  - Extract argument names correctly, stripping default values
  - Handle strings with commas in default values (e.g., func(a, Q = ","))
  - Skip functions with destructuring params
- Fix double brace issues in C codegen for several opcodes:
  - get_var/get_var_undef: Fixed global variable access
  - throw: Fixed exception throwing
  - put_array_el: Fixed array element assignment
  - get_length: Fixed array length access
  - catch: Fixed exception catching
  - set_var_ref/put_var_ref_check/nip_catch: Fixed closure var stubs
  - delete: Fixed property deletion

Tested on Claude Code CLI (14MB bundle, 14356 functions, 9470 freezable)
- Successfully generates 4.6MB of frozen C code
- Handles unsupported opcodes gracefully (get_var_ref, array_from, etc.)

Remaining issues to fix:
- Some trampoline vs non-trampoline codegen paths still have bugs
- String escaping in generated C code needs attention
